import pytest
from myapp import config
from myapp.cache import GLOBAL_CACHE

@pytest.fixture
def debug_mode():
    old_debug = config.DEBUG
    old_level = config.LOG_LEVEL
    config.DEBUG = True
    config.LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"
    yield
    config.DEBUG = old_debug
    config.LOG_LEVEL = old_level

def test_enable_debug_mode(debug_mode):
    assert config.DEBUG is True

@pytest.fixture
def custom_cache():
    old_ttl = GLOBAL_CACHE.ttl
    old_max = GLOBAL_CACHE.max_entries
    GLOBAL_CACHE.ttl = 600
    GLOBAL_CACHE.max_entries = 5000
    yield
    GLOBAL_CACHE.ttl = old_ttl
    GLOBAL_CACHE.max_entries = old_max

def test_set_cache_ttl(custom_cache):
    assert GLOBAL_CACHE.ttl == 600

@pytest.fixture
def feature_flags():
    old_flags = dict(config.FEATURE_FLAGS)
    config.FEATURE_FLAGS["new_checkout"] = True
    config.FEATURE_FLAGS["dark_mode"] = True
    yield
    config.FEATURE_FLAGS.clear()
    config.FEATURE_FLAGS.update(old_flags)

def test_change_feature_flags(feature_flags):
    assert config.FEATURE_FLAGS["new_checkout"] is True
